Captain America: The First Avenger (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $176,654,505Details
International Box Office $193,915,271
Worldwide Box Office $370,569,776
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $48,877,322
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $103,254,809
Total $152,132,131
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Captain America: The First Avenger will focus on the early days of the Marvel Universe when Steve Rogers volunteers to participate in an experimental program that turns him into the Super Soldier known as Captain America. As Captain America, Rogers joins forces with Bucky Barnes and Peggy Carter to wage war on the evil HYDRA organization, led by the villainous Red Skull.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$65,058,524 (36.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$140,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,715 opening theaters/3,715 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $266,429,751

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 22nd, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: August 17th, 2018 (Wide), released as Captain America: The First Avenger (re:2018) (Australia)
Video Release: October 25th, 2011 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi violence and action.
(Rating bulletin 2180, 7/13/2011)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: Captain America, Marvel Cinematic Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Prologue, Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Good vs. Evil, Nazis, Non-Chronological, Occult, Origin Story, Orphan, Presumed Dead, Rescue, Super Soldier Serum, War
Social setting: World War II
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Norse Mythology
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Captain America: The First Avenger will focus on the early days of the Marvel Universe when Steve Rogers volunteers to participate in an experimental program that turns him into the Super Soldier known as Captain America. As Captain America, Rogers joins forces with Bucky Barnes and Peggy Carter to wage war on the evil HYDRA organization, led by the villainous Red Skull.

Opening Weekend:$65,058,524 (36.8% of total gross)
